_description: Copy to state/repos.json and fill in your own repos. One entry per repo you want the commander to poll.

_trigger_modes.assignee: Commander picks up issues assigned to you (the gh auth user). Simplest UX — no labels required. Good if you treat 'assigned to me' as 'please take this'.
_trigger_modes.label: Commander picks up only issues labeled 'commander-ready'. Explicit per-ticket opt-in. Use this if your 'assigned to me' field is already used for personal work tracking.

notes: State labels (commander-working, commander-review, commander-stuck, commander-rejected, commander-reviewed, commander-skill-promotion) are created lazily by the commander on first use. You don't need to create them up-front.
